title: Dominion Craft
body:
Update teaser [Youtube.com](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbX7TnbzS-U&feature=youtu.be)
# 🦖 Dominion Craft (Early Access)
Welcome to the start of the Jurassic world! Dominion Craft brings back the creatures that once ruled the Earth. Explore Mesozoic biomes, discover the mysterious Tacano biome (where Jurassic World dinosaurs roam), and master genetic science to breed your own creatures.

In this Early Access version, you can interact with Velociraptor mongoliensis, the iconic Nublarensis, and the powerful Triceratops. But be careful—playing God comes with a price! 👀

## 📖 Quick Start Tutorial
The Genetic Lab To create life, you’ll need the right tools:

The Syringe: Crafted with 2 Cobbled Deepslate and 1 Glass. This is your primary tool for extracting and manipulating DNA.

DNA and Incubation: Extract components (Mosquitoes and Eggs) to bring your baby raptors to life using the Incubator.

Breeding and Taming

Raptors: You must tame them while they are babies. Once they grow up (currently using the growth syringe from Creative mode), their wild instincts will awaken.

Baby Raptor Love: If your raptor has grown up and doesn't recognize you, use this item to try and calm/tame it... if it doesn't kill you first!

Triceratops: You can now ride them! Explore the world on the back of these beasts (Note: natural growth is currently under development).

Engineering and Trading: The Paleo Table Need to secure your base? Look for the Paleontologists. They will trade you all the fences (poles) needed for your enclosures.

Construction Trick: Place a fence in the crafting slot of the Paleo Table to "bend" it, allowing you to create corners and custom designs for your cages.

## 🌍 Biomes
Explore Mesozoic Biomes to find fossils and the dangerous Tacano, the only place where dinosaurs inspired by Jurassic World spawn naturally.

## 🦖 Available Dinosaurs (Current Version)
These are the specimens players can already find in Early Access:

Velociraptor mongoliensis: Small, feathered, and lethal. The real hunter.

Velociraptor nublarensis: The iconic, large-scale version from Jurassic World.

Triceratops (Male, Female, and Royal): The herbivorous tank. You can ride them now!

Therizinosaurus: The giant with long claws. Watch out for its reach!

 ##🔜 Coming Soon (Next Update)
To build some hype, here is a list of dinosaurs arriving to complete the mod:

Tyrannosaurus Rex: The absolute king is coming to reclaim the Tacano biome.

Carnotaurus: The fast-moving, horned predator.

metriacanthosaurus: the not appearing dinosaur in jp

Parasaurolophus: the always appearing dinosaur

Gallimimus: the ostrich like dinosaur

more coming in future..

New Growth Mechanics: Natural growth system for the Triceratops (no syringe required).

AI Improvements: Enhanced pack behavior for raptors.

### 📝 Early Access Note:
The Therizinosaurus is one of the most territorial creatures in the mod. If you get too close to its claws, it won't hesitate to defend its space! Make sure to bring plenty of medical gear if you plan on exploring near them.

# The Dominion Craft Team
